/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/test_pipeline.dir/test/test_pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_pipeline.dir/src/clip_detector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_pipeline.dir/src/declipper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_pipeline.dir/src/metrics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_pipeline.dir/src/post_filter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_pipeline.dir/src/reconstructor.cpp.o -o test_pipeline  -lsndfile
